comment.body:
I hope, everyone had a nice week again.
I dropped a thread about Monday upwards pressrure on VIX and also the pinning effect in the Monday chat. 

Also dropped a post about Iran risk (crucial, underpriced!),
and analysed NVDA ER, explaining the first signs of the bubble being too extended.
Please, look for them. Share them, like them if you appreciate them...
https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/s/free-quant-insights-market-reports

Also dropped a public post about drawing the attention of the three main risk, on twitter:
https://x.com/alma271828/status/2027185159691288901

comment.body: I think itll go down. At least i bet on it. I think Opec will cover  it Iran exports roughly 1.5-1.8M bpd. Saudi production has been increasing since Dec 2025. Ramadan gives them the easy "yo we didn't want this...but we will stabilize the market". Maybe coincidence. But me thinks opec increasing supply is what will settle markets. Whether this draws out and the consequences of that idk.
